title: Lunar Ping Display
description: Replaces TAB player list ping bars with colored numeric values.
body:
Lunar Ping Display is a simple client-side mod for Minecraft 1.8.9 that replaces the usual ping bars in the TAB player list with easy-to-read numeric values (in milliseconds).

The numbers change color based on your ping:

*   Green for great connection (under 150ms)
*   Yellow (150–300ms)
*   Orange (300–600ms)
*   Red for higher ping

It's inspired by the clean look of Lunar Client, so you get precise ping info at a glance without guessing from bars.

## **How to use it:**

*   Just install the mod and join any server or world — it works automatically.
*   To turn it on or off anytime: type /pingdisplay in chat. A small menu will pop up where you can toggle the numeric ping with one click.

No complicated setup, works great in singleplayer or multiplayer, and stays super lightweight.

Thanks so much for giving Lunar Ping Display a try… I really hope it makes your gameplay a little smoother and more enjoyable!

 If you face any problem with this mod, contact me on my discord worst\_boy.
